title: RapidFailProtection
description: Rapid fail protection settings that determine how IIS responds to repeated worker process failures.

enabled.description: Whether rapid fail protection is enabled.

load_balancer_capabilities.description: The load balancer capabilities response type.

interval.description: The time interval in minutes during which the max crash count is monitored.

max_crashes.description: The maximum number of worker process crashes allowed within the interval.

auto_shutdown_exe.description: The path to an executable to run when the application pool is shut down due to rapid fail protection.

auto_shutdown_params.description: Parameters for the auto shutdown executable.
